mapper.select: SELECT * FROM board_columns WHERE board_id = #{boardId}::uuid ORDER BY position ASC, created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_columns (id, board_id, name, column_type, settings, position, is_required, is_hidden, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id}::uuid, #{boardId}::uuid, #{name}, #{columnType}, #{settings}::jsonb, #{position}, #{isRequired}, #{isHidden}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, NOW()), COALESCE(#{updatedAt}, NOW()) )
mapper.update: UPDATE board_columns SET name = #{name}, column_type = #{columnType}, settings = #{settings}::jsonb, position = #{position}, is_required = #{isRequired}, is_hidden = #{isHidden}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
